found_stable.quote: The Board will consist of five directors: two Founder Designees selected by the Founder Holders, two Series A Designees selected by the Requisite Holders, and one independent director selected solely by the Series A Designees.
Each stockholder must provide any indemnity, escrow, holdback, non-compete covenant, or other seller obligation requested by the buyer as a condition to the drag-along.
but transfers by Founder Holders are excluded from tag-along rights.

Each Major Investor may receive monthly unaudited financial statements within 15 days after month-end and may inspect all Company books, records, source materials, employee communications, and facilities at any time without limitation.
